Actions.Text: REFERRED TO CIVIL SERVICE AND PENSIONS

Title: Grants retroactive tier IV membership in the New York state and local employees' retirement system to Katie Adamek
Summary: Grants retroactive tier IV membership in the New York state and local employees' retirement system to Katie Adamek, who is an employee of the Schenectady City School District beginning November 23, 2009.
ActClause: AN ACT granting retroactive tier IV membership in the New York state and local employees' retirement system to Katie Adamek
